item.title: He Didn't Need NATO. He Didn't Need Britain. He Didn't Need Anyone. Update: He Needs Fucking Everyone.
item.description: Trump started an unauthorized war, spent $11.3 billion in the first week, asked China, France, Japan, South Korea and the UK to please send ships, and then NOBODY SENT SHIPS. Not one. No country stepped forward. The man who dismantled NATO is discovering why NATO existed. ??? This is the same man who EIGHT FUCKING DAYS AGO told the UK he didn't need their warships. He specifically said he didn't need British ships. He then started a war. He then asked Britain for ships. Britain remembered what he said. Britain did not send ships. CAUSE. MEET. FUCKING. EFFECT. ??⚓? He spent years insulting allies. Pulled out of agreements. Called NATO obsolete. Threatened to let Russia do whatever it wanted. Imposed tariffs on everyone. And now he's on Truth Social at 3AM asking China and France pretty please to send warships. The silence is DEAFENING. ??? No country stepped forward. Not one. The man who burned every alliance, insulted every partner, and told Britain he didn't need their ships is now discovering that when you piss in the well you can't drink from it during a war you started alone. Enjoy the Hormuz. ???? #NoCountrySteppedForward #IranWar #NATO #BritishShips #Allies #TrumpWar #HormuzStrait #YouBurnedTheBridges #AlliancesMatter #NowYouNeedThem https://www.rawstory.com/trump-2676160204/
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @Ubersnaps made this beaded container. Love it. Check more of their work in their posts.
27 Man Tax: Heath Ledger
“I can not do everything, but I can do something. I must not fail to do the something that I can do.” - Helen Keller So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: To give back the memes that I have stolen (part 56)
item.description:
Legit trying to find these now as the hubs needs them to heal his inner child
Keep up the good ood job friendo!
Why are they so dang cute
In case I missed your birthday… Happiest of all birthdays you beautiful human!
Why is this so true
Facts
Also facts
Yes please, can I order in bulk?
1 gazillion %
You know who you are, and thanks babes!
Oops sorry this is in here twice, welp the universe must really need you to understand this (also I don’t know how to remove it without starting over so you’re welcome)
How vegetables are really made but no one will tell you
If I had to see this so do you, only partially sorry
Happy happy joy joy
But like for real why!?!??
Gold star bay-bee!!
Love you weirdos! Keep it weird Imgur!

item.title: jfc my blood is boiling
item.description: He is facing multiple charges, btw, including Ethnic Intimidation After receiving threats online, he delivered to her a hand-written apology but the charges are still proceeding and no doubt the letter will be used as evidence along with the video. AGH This is Bill Jubran and he's awesome. Subscribe to his shit. He does mostly response videos to right-wing influencers who make fallacious claims. Mr. Global is also really awesome. Does response videos about green energy and Trump supporters and has the energy creds..
item.dc:creator: majortool

item.title: I keep thinking about these girls and my heart breaks for them… would you be willing to help?
item.description:
The more I look into this, the more depressing it is. I’m going crazy because I don’t know what to do and I want to help them!
Maybe I can talk to lawyers and set up a gofund and see if we can help them… I don’t know what else to do but I feel we must act and do something for these girls. I can’t imagine being isolated and abused… but as a mother, I can’t help but think of my children and what I would do for them. So I’m thinking if I start raising money for lawyer fees and some to send these girls for food, calls, basic needs etc… I don’t know… I just need do something about it.
I’m reaching out to you all as a community that helps out and comes together for good… if anyone can also help with immigration lawyer information, if you know any lawyer that’d be willing to help and share their information that would be greatly appreciated. I have to do something, I have to at least try. I would always wonder how people were taken into concentration camps and no one did anything…. I don’t want to be a bystander while children are being abused and trafficked… sorry for the long rant… please help if you can. I’ll make a post and update this one if I find lawyers willing to help fight for these children and hopefully set up a go fund me to help with costs etc…. Please be kind to each other for times rough and we all have our own battles.
item.dc:creator: IAmFeatherWeightHearMeRoar23

item.title: More Arrests Than Tupac. Zero Self Awareness. Maximum Irony. This Is The House Judiciary Committee.
item.description: That cunt Lauren Boebert has been arrested more times than every Black member of Congress combined. Let that fucking land. The woman who calls Ilhan Omar a terrorist. The woman who implies Muslim lawmakers are dangerous. Has more mugshots than the people she fears. ??? She didn't finish high school. She got her GED the same month she was sworn into Congress. She has been arrested for multiple offenses including public indecency in a theatre while VAPING. She is somehow on the House Judiciary Committee. The irony has achieved sentience and is screaming. ??⚖️ Ilhan Omar fled a refugee camp, earned a degree, got elected to Congress, and has never been arrested once in her entire life. Lauren Boebert got a GED, got elected to Congress, and has been arrested MULTIPLE TIMES. One of them is called the terrorist. Take your fucking time. ?? The least educated member of Congress. More arrests than every Black colleague combined. More arrests than TUPAC. Sits on the Judiciary Committee. Calls Muslim women terrorists. This is not satire. This is the United States House of Representatives. God fucking help us all. ????️ #LaurenBoebert #IlhanOmar #HouseOfRepresentatives #Hypocrisy #Congress #Judiciary #Accountability #DoAsISayNotAsDo #GEDToCongressPipeline #TupacHadFewerArrests
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: GovBrief Today #408
item.description: Donald Trump can never run for office again, but he's still fundraising, this time with photos of America's unburied war dead. A Trump-linked PAC named Never Surrender Inc. sent donors a fundraising email this week built around a photograph of a dignified transfer, the military ceremony where the fallen come home for the last time. The pitch offers a "National Security Briefing Membership" to anyone willing to "CLAIM YOUR SPOT." Thirteen Americans have died in a war Congress never authorized. Multiple U.S. embassies have come under attack, and this week the State Department told Americans to get out of Iraq immediately, by land. Soldiers who've carried the caskets of fallen American service members say the weight tells them everything. The caskets are all the same. What's different is what's inside, and their arms know it the moment they lift. That weight is what came home. "CLAIM YOUR SPOT" is what the president's operation thinks it's worth. He's inflicting his second term on this country, and in November, it's time to start putting checks and balances back in place. If you're not registered to vote, do it today at vote.org. We've emailed 6,600+ stories over 408 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/ven-emb-flag [2] https://go.govbrief.today/leave-iraq [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar14 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/interceptor-repaired [5] https://go.govbrief.today/calif-oil-emergency [6] https://go.govbrief.today/broadcast-threat [7] https://go.govbrief.today/fundraise-casket [8] https://go.govbrief.today/beatty-kenctr Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com ===IMGUR MESSAGE=== Don't know what happened yesterday, but it's been part of a trend that has seen views over the last 3 months drop yet again 50%. I've never had a day as sparsely viewed as yesterday. In fact, yesterday was 27% below Christmas Day! What can I say. The platform is clearly making a choice. I hope you'll sign up for GovBrief's email in case I'm permanently locked out or suppressed. There are chat modes there as well as email and other links. I answer all my email and read every chat message. Think of it as a failsafe as the slide to becoming Thunder Dungeon continues. Not that there's anything wrong with TD. It's just not the community that Imgur was.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: The TRUTH about Crystal River and Three Sisters Springs Manatee Tourism
item.description: I've grown tired of all the misinformation surrounding Crystal River and the laws regarding manatees. This is an effort to clear up some of that misinformation. And for the record, I don't rent canoes, kayaks or any other kind of boat and I don't do tours so I really don't care where people go to see manatees. Here's a link to the full video on YouTube for anyone that's interested, https://youtu.be/tjSxXpKJwL8 Tour companies in Crystal River want people to believe that Crystal River is the only place you can "swim with manatees". They mislead people into believing that the laws in place to protect manatees are different in Crystal River. And they would also like people to think that Crystal River is the only place where manatees congregate in large numbers. NONE of these things are true, at all. There are at least 7 places in Florida where manatees gather by the hundreds. And the laws that protect Manatees are the exact same in Crystal River as they are in the rest of Florida or the U.S. Manatees are protected by federal law by way of the MMPA (Marine Mammals Protection Act), and also the Florida Manatee Sanctuary Act. Neither of these laws have any exceptions for Crystal River or any other location. There is nothing that says anything like "it's ok to swim with manatees but only in Crystal River". And neither of these laws make any exceptions for circumstance either. For example, there is nothing in these laws that states it's ok to touch a manatee as long as it touches you first or as long as it comes up to you. So the fact is there is NOTHING you can do in Crystal River that you can't do anywhere else, such as "swim with manatees". And you aren't allowed to touch manatees anywhere, including Crystal River. And even though you can swim with manatees anywhere you want in Florida, you aren't supposed to approach them, follow them, touch them or do anything else that could be interpreted as disturbing them. It doesn't matter if you're in Crystal River or the Keys, the laws are the same. The ONLY thing different about Crystal River is that tour companies that operate "swim with manatee" tours must obtain a special use permit from the U.S.FWS. (United States Fish and Wildlife Service) These permits simply ensure that the tour company and it's employees are aware of, and follow the existing laws. The permits do NOT give the tour companies or its customers any "special permissions". So how do you have a memorable manatee encounter without getting a fine? Don't approach them, keep a respectful distance and they will often come up to you. And that's fine, you don't need to run. Just keep your hands to yourself at all times and don't try to follow it when it leaves. Although I don't care where people go to see manatees, I strongly recommend seeing them in the summer instead of the winter. During the winter the manatees gather in groups at warm water locations throughout the state. They don't have a thick layer of blubber like some marine mammals so they need these warm water spots to survive the winters. They can't just leave when people start crowding around them. They HAVE to put up with the people. None of these video clips were taken in Crystal River, they were all taken in other parts of Florida. All of the pics and videos I post are taken by me. For more OC nature vids check my profile or look for See Through Canoe Company on YouTube, BlueSky, FB & other social media sites.
item.dc:creator: SeeThroughCanoe

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
It's a snowy Sunday in Minnesota and we're excited for TheFreePizzaDude post today! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been an amazing help in feeding more people, we love you so much! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 6pm central
Puckett and PJ are all cuddled up to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 1220 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 1230 5th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 100 6th and 7th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 150 8th, 9th, 10th and 11th by @OP 300 12th, 13th, 14th and 15th by @OP 400 16th and 17th by Pizza Angel @Pot314 530 18th, 19th, 20th and 21st by @OP 600 22nd, Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant and 25th by Pizza Angel @NoRoutesFound 600 26th, 27th and 28th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen ... Today's Grocery Tally 1230 1st by Grocery Angel @AyatollahBahloni 300 2nd by Grocery Angel @pot314 430 3rd by Grocery Angel @pot314
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: My friend’s cat’s kittens!
item.description:
My friend’s cat, Circe, gave birth a couple of weeks ago.
She’s a gorgeous tuxie who had five kittens
Three calicos and two tuxies
Four girls and one boy
Her kids are obsessed!
Mama Circe is a natural!
Circe is totally fine with her babies being handled, which isn’t always a given!
Their eyes are open and they are very active!
I can’t wait for my pregnant foster mama cat Bobbie to give birth. I check on her via the kitten room cameras at least every two hours and spend as much time as I can here in the kitten room.
Any day now! Hurry up, Bobbie, I’m impatient!!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
